name: THE ADRENALINE MAN
overview: Adrenaline Man is based on the real and extreme life of Andre "Relentless" Alexsen spanning some 35 years of real and extreme adventures ranging from stuntman/ daredevil to wild animal handler trainer, to working and training with our Military.

trailers.title: THE ADRENALINE MAN  IS ANDRE ALEXSEN MOST EXTREME TV SHOW EVER FILMED, TRAILER , VIDEO , REEL.
